overall.description: First-person exploration of the Hufflepuff common room from Hogwarts Legacy, showcasing the cozy wooden interior with magical portraits, students in robes relaxing by the fireplace, and the dormitory quarters featuring an owl companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy corner with ornate mirror and paintings

events.description: camera looks down to focus on table with potted plants
camera pans right to reveal bookshelf and seated student

agents.ego_description: examining the wall decorations, mirror, and table plants in the quiet corner

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting in armchair reading a book

entered.detail: tall arched mirror with elaborate carved wooden frame
collection of framed portraits hanging on brick wall
curved dark wooden table with decorative legs
small green cactus in terracotta pot
large woven basket with blooming sunflowers
plush red upholstered armchair with wooden trim

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a cozy corner of the common room featuring an ornate mirror and framed paintings on a brick wall. The camera examines a wooden table with potted plants including a cactus and sunflowers, then pans to reveal a student reading in a red armchair beside a bookshelf.

scene_state.functional_zone: main common room with central fireplace

events.description: moving from enclosed corner into the large open common room space
student ahead sits down on the leather couch
ascending stone stairs through the circular archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the staircase, passing students and furniture

notable_agents.action: student in black robes walking ahead and sitting on the leather couch
student walking across the room toward the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle
tufted brown leather sofa with rolled arms
tall floor lamp with glowing stained glass shade
upper level wooden balcony with carved railings
large circular wooden archway leading to stone stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the corner into the spacious main common room, revealing a large stone fireplace, leather seating, and students moving about. The space features wooden balconies overhead and warm lighting from stained glass lamps. The camera approaches and begins ascending a stone staircase through a circular archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with barrel vault ceiling

events.description: entering the upper level barrel-vaulted corridor
passing through the circular stained glass door into the dormitory wing

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and moving through the corridor toward the dormitory rooms

entered.detail: arched wooden ceiling with exposed beams and stone walls
circular wooden door with decorative stained glass panels
stacks of books on small wooden tables along the wall
lit wall-mounted lanterns with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends into a corridor with a distinctive barrel-vaulted ceiling and hexagonal floor tiles. The space is lined with wall sconces and stacks of books. The camera approaches and passes through a circular stained glass door into the dormitory wing.

scene_state.functional_zone: student dormitory bedroom with multiple beds

events.description: entering the dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds
owl perched on dresser turns its head to look directly at camera
turning around to exit the bedroom

agents.ego_description: examining the bedroom furnishings and observing the owl before turning to leave

notable_agents.action: white owl perched on dresser turning its head to look at camera

entered.detail: wooden four-poster beds with checkered blankets and white pillows
tall wooden wardrobe with carved details and metal handles
wooden desk with lamp, books, and writing materials
arched window with stained glass panels

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cozy dormitory bedroom featuring multiple four-poster beds, wooden dressers, and writing desks. A white owl perched on the dresser turns to observe the camera. After examining the room, the camera turns and exits back into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, intimate corner of the Hufflepuff common room into the expansive main hall and finally into a private dormitory. It begins by examining an ornate mirror and potted plants on a wooden table before panning toward a student reading in a red armchair. As the camera moves away from the corner, the space opens into a spacious common room filled with leather seating and students gathered around a large stone fireplace under wooden balconies. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a stone staircase through a circular archway, moving through a barrel-vaulted corridor lined with books before passing through a stained glass door. Finally, the camera enters a cozy bedroom featuring four-poster beds and a white owl perched on a dresser, before turning back to exit into the corridor.
